<!-- indicator: fig-agop-hosp-0-4 -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-agop-hosp-0-4
#| fig-cap: 'Asthma, Gastroenteritis, Otitis Media, and Pneumonia Hospitalizations, Rate per 10,000 Population Aged 0–4 Years, 2020–2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Asthma, Gastroenteritis, Otitis Media, and Pneumonia Hospitalizations, Rate per 10,000 Population Aged 0–4 Years, 2020–2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-agop-hosp-0-4", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
